# Context7 Query Prompts

Use these query shapes to refresh source context before answering Livewire 4 Pages questions. Always keep the query scoped to `/websites/livewire_laravel_4_x`.

## Page Components, Routing, And Layouts
```text
Livewire 4 Pages documentation: page components, full-page components, Route::livewire, pages:: namespace, make:livewire pages::post.create, resources/views/pages, layouts::app, livewire:layout, component_layout config, #[Layout], layout(), #[Title], title(), named layout slots, route parameters, route model binding, and automatic public property assignment. Return documented APIs, commands, paths, namespaces, examples, and caveats only.
```

## Navigate, Redirects, And Page Visits
```text
Livewire 4 Navigate and Redirecting documentation for Pages: wire:navigate, wire:navigate.hover, redirects with navigate: true, $this->redirect, redirectRoute, redirectIntended, redirectAction, flash messages, @persist, wire:navigate:scroll, data-current, wire:current, wire:current.ignore, livewire:navigate, livewire:navigating, livewire:navigated, Livewire.navigate(), script evaluation, data-navigate-track, data-navigate-once, and navigate progress bar config. Return documented syntax, examples, configuration keys, and caveats only.
```

## URL Query Parameters
```text
Livewire 4 URL query parameter documentation for page state: #[Url], property initialization from URL, nullable query values, as aliases, except values, keep true, history true, queryString() method, trait query string hooks, filters, sorting, pagination, shareable URLs, and bookmarkable page state. Return documented attributes, method names, examples, and caveats only.
```

## Page Component Organization And Troubleshooting
```text
Livewire 4 component organization documentation for page components: pages:: components, layouts:: namespace, component_namespaces, component_locations, Livewire::addComponent, Livewire::addLocation, Livewire::addNamespace, rendering namespaced components with <livewire:pages::...>, page component file path mapping, single-file components, multi-file components, class-based components, livewire:stubs, component not found troubleshooting, missing root element, syntax errors, Laravel logs, view cache, and class-name conflicts. Return documented APIs, paths, examples, and caveats only.
```
